description_long: This is a tall, slender stone obelisk with a square base, rising vertically and tapering to a pointed tip. The surface of the obelisk is weathered, with visible patches of moss and discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The base is robust and blocky, featuring engraved panels on each side, some of which display faint decorative motifs or possible inscriptions. The obelisk itself is relatively plain, with subtle relief work near the lower section and a smooth, unadorned shaft above. The tip is sharply pointed and capped with a small, pyramidal finial. The entire structure sits on a slightly raised, moss-covered plinth, blending into a natural or urban park setting.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a square, engraved base and a mossy plinth, tapering to a pointed tip. Subtle reliefs and discoloration add to its aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved panel and relief details on the base, with moss and weathering most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the plain shaft and the gradual tapering, with less visible engraving and more discoloration.
description_view_2: Rear view displays another engraved panel, with the moss and weathering distributed differently across the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the least ornamentation, with the shaft appearing smooth and the base heavily mossed.
attribute_inscription: Faint engravings or inscriptions are visible on the panels of the base, but the text is largely illegible due to weathering and moss.
attribute_ornamentation: Subtle relief work and decorative motifs are present on the base panels; the shaft is mostly plain.
attribute_base_design: The base is square and blocky, with engraved panels on each side and a moss-covered plinth. It appears solid and slightly raised from the ground.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, capped with a small pyramidal finial, and is unadorned.
attribute_surrounding_features: Moss and vegetation are present around the base; no other notable surrounding features are visible.
